user_education.question: Is this transaction safe?
user_education.response:
Let me help you verify. Check these red flags:
• Is the recipient someone you know?
• Did you initiate this transaction?
• Does the amount seem correct?
• Are you being pressured to act quickly?

If anything seems suspicious, stop and verify through official channels.

user_education.question: Someone is asking for my PIN
user_education.response:
🚨 STOP! This is a scam. NEVER share your PIN with anyone, including:
• Bank staff
• Customer support
• Family or friends
• Anyone claiming to be from SznPay

Your PIN is for your eyes only. Report this attempt immediately.

user_education.question: I received a suspicious message
user_education.response:
⚠️ Good catch! Here's what to do:
1. Don't click any links
2. Don't reply or provide information
3. Don't call any numbers in the message
4. Forward it to us for verification
5. Delete the message

We'll never ask for sensitive info via message.

user_education.question: How do I know if a transaction is fraudulent?
user_education.response:
🛡️ Watch for these fraud indicators:
• You didn't authorize it
• Unusual amount or recipient
• Strange transaction time
• Multiple rapid transactions
• Recipient you don't recognize

If you see any of these, contact us immediately to block your account.

user_education.question: What is phishing?
user_education.response:
🎣 Phishing is when scammers pretend to be legitimate organizations to steal your information.

Common phishing tactics:
• Fake emails/SMS from 'your bank'
• Links to fake websites
• Requests for passwords or PINs
• Urgent threats about account closure

Always verify through official channels!

user_education.question: How can I protect my account?
user_education.response:
🔐 Essential security tips:
1. Use strong, unique passwords
2. Enable 2FA/biometric auth
3. Never share PIN or OTP
4. Check account regularly
5. Use official apps only
6. Keep contact info updated
7. Report suspicious activity
8. Avoid public WiFi for banking

Your security is our priority!

threat_detection.response: 🚨 SCAM ALERT! This is advance fee fraud. Legitimate services NEVER ask you to send money to verify your account or claim prizes. Block this sender and report to us immediately.
⚠️ This is a lottery scam! You can't win a lottery you didn't enter. They'll ask for 'processing fees' but you'll never see the prize. Delete and block.
🚨 PHISHING ATTEMPT! Don't click that link. It leads to a fake website designed to steal your credentials. SznPay will never send links asking for login info.
⚠️ Scam alert! Fraudsters use fear tactics. If your account was really suspended, you wouldn't be able to log in. Verify through the official app, not through links in messages.

threat_detection.pattern: send OTP|share OTP|what is your OTP
threat_detection.response: 🚨 STOP! NEVER share your OTP with anyone! This is a scam. OTPs are for your use only. Even SznPay staff will never ask for your OTP. Report this immediately.

transaction_risk.description: Transaction amount significantly higher than normal
Large round number transaction (common in fraud)

unusual_login.trigger: login from new device or location
unusual_login.message:
⚠️ We noticed a login from a new device in {location}. Was this you?

If not, secure your account immediately:
1. Change your password
2. Review recent activity
3. Contact support

If this was you, you can mark this device as trusted.

account_takeover_suspected.message:
🚨 SECURITY ALERT: Suspicious activity detected on your account.

For your protection:
• Your account has been temporarily locked
• All transactions are suspended
• We've sent a verification code to your registered phone

To unlock, verify your identity through the app or contact support immediately.

sim_swap_detected.message:
🚨 CRITICAL SECURITY ALERT: Possible SIM swap attack detected.

Immediate actions taken:
• Account frozen
• All transactions blocked
• Security team notified

If you did not request a SIM change:
1. Contact your network provider immediately
2. Contact SznPay support
3. File a police report

Do NOT attempt to access your account until verified.

first_transaction.message:
🎓 Security Tip: Before sending money, always:
✓ Verify recipient details
✓ Double-check the amount
✓ Ensure you trust the recipient
✓ Never share your PIN or OTP

Stay safe!

large_transaction.message:
💡 Sending a large amount? Remember:
• Verify recipient through another channel
• Save trusted beneficiaries for future
• Enable transaction notifications
• Report if anything seems suspicious

new_device.message:
🔐 New device detected! Security reminders:
• Use strong passwords
• Enable biometric login
• Don't save passwords in browser
• Log out when done
• Report lost devices immediately

metadata.description: Security patterns and automated response rules for threat detection
